short_description.value: ViTAEv2-S is a vision transformer backbone pretrained from scratch on the MillionAID remote sensing dataset for aerial image understanding. It incorporates CNN inductive biases and a stage-wise design for improved locality and scale-invariance, and is evaluated on scene recognition, semantic segmentation, object detection, and change detection tasks.

pretraining.value: Supervised pretraining on MillionAID (RGB aerial images, 51 classes, 949,848 training images, 51,000 validation images), using standard classification objective.

value.value: Window-based multi-head self-attention (WMHSA) in early stages
Removal of SiLU in last PCM conv layer
Global (images from various countries and regions)

image_resolution.value: variable (110x110 to 31672x31672), resized to 224x224 for training

sampling.value: Random sampling, 51,000 images (1,000 per class) for validation, rest for training

value.value: USGS National Map Urban Area Imagery Database
